# Debbie Welch Homes

> Snohomish County, WA real estate broker (eXp Realty) helping buyers, sellers, downsizers, military families, and relocation clients with calm, organized guidance.

Debbie Welch is a full-service real estate broker based in Snohomish County, Washington, serving Lake Stevens, Everett, Marysville, Snohomish, Arlington, Bothell, Mill Creek, Stanwood, Camano Island, and Mukilteo. Specialties include first-time buyers, downsizers, military PCS / VA loan clients, and out-of-area relocation.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of Debbie Welch's Snohomish County real estate practice.
- [About](/about): Background, approach, and what to expect working with Debbie.
- [Contact](/contact): Phone, email, and contact form. Personal reply within one business day.
- [Services](/services): Overview of buying, selling, relocation, and downsizing services.
- [Listings](/listings): Recently sold and represented Snohomish County properties.
- [Blog](/blog): Real-estate articles, market updates, and local guides.

## Services

- [Buying](/services/buying): Step-by-step buyer guidance, financing, neighborhood matching, offers.
- [Selling](/services/selling): Pricing strategy, prep, marketing, negotiation, and closing.
- [Relocation](/services/relocation): Military PCS and out-of-area buyer support, virtual touring.
- [Downsizing](/services/downsizing): Patient, organized downsizing for empty nesters and retirees.

## Area Guides

- [Snohomish County](/areas/snohomish-county): Countywide overview.
- [Lake Stevens](/areas/lake-stevens): Lake-area homes and community guide.
- [Everett & Mukilteo](/areas/everett-mukilteo): Boeing and Naval Station Everett area.
- [Marysville](/areas/marysville): Family neighborhoods and new construction.
- [Snohomish](/areas/snohomish): Historic charm and acreage.
- [Arlington](/areas/arlington): Small-town feel with growing inventory.
- [Bothell & Mill Creek](/areas/bothell-mill-creek): South Snohomish County commuter towns.
- [Stanwood & Camano](/areas/stanwood-camano): Coastal and island living.
